incident_summary: Laboratory analyst OP-5441 performed dissolution testing of batch C7088C without completing analytical method transfer training for this product. Results invalid.
root_cause_detail: Product transferred from another site — analyst training plan not updated to include new product method training. Training manager not informed of product transfer in time.
corrective_action: Results invalidated. Analyst {op()} trained and assessed on dissolution method. Test repeated by qualified analyst. Batch released after confirmatory results.
preventive_action: Product transfer checklist includes mandatory training plan update as step 1 — no analytical work permitted on transferred product until training plan confirmed current by QA.
effectiveness_check: Zero unqualified analyst testing events for 12 months. 100% product transfer training plan completion before first batch tested.
